title: callostylis rigida subsp. discolor
intro: Callostylis rigida subsp. discolor, also known as the yellowish green callostylis, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, while also providing protection against cancer and cardiovascular diseases. The herbal preparations of Callostylis rigida subsp. discolor are typically made from its leaves and roots, which can be dried, powdered, or steeped in hot water to create teas or infusions.
